mapper.select: SELECT o.id as id, o.customer_id as customerId, u.email as customerEmail, o.state_id as stateId, o.total_amount as totalAmount, o.currency as currency, o.order_number as orderNumber, o.created_time as createdAt FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user_profiles u ON o.customer_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT oi.order_id as "orderId", oi.id as "orderItemId", oi.product_id as "productId", oi.product_name as "productName", oi.quantity as "quantity", oi.unit_price as "unitPrice", oi.total_price as "itemSalesAmount", o.created_time as "orderDate" FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE oi.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND oi.status = 'DELIVERED' AND (oi.settlement_status = 'PENDING' OR oi.settlement_status IS NULL) AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.created_time) = #{month} AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.created_time) = #{year}

SELECT oi.supplier_id as "supplierId", SUM(oi.total_price) as "heldAmount", COUNT(oi.id) as "itemCount" FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.status = 'DELIVERED' AND (oi.settlement_status = 'PENDING' OR oi.settlement_status IS NULL) GROUP BY oi.supplier_id
